form.formComment: Second-up today. First-up after 13 to post a big 7 len win. Downpatrick on March 29 over 4425m defeating Coppola carrying 70kg at $4.50 in a hurdle. Previously second-up didn't finish the race at Clonmel on June 7 2024 over 4626m. Key runner who is expected to feature again.
